texto: A little while and I will be gone from among you, whither I cannot tell. From nowhere we come, into nowhere we go. What is life? It is a flash of firefly in the night. It is a breath of a buffalo in the wintertime. It is as the little shadow that runs across the grass and loses itself in the sunset.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Chief Crowfoot que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “A little while and I will be gone from among you, whither I cannot tell. From nowhere we come, in…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, life-and-death, little, com foco em boa-noite e luto.
